description: User behavior profile used by the World Awareness Layer to adapt presentation style. No AI personality. No conversational system. Only presentation strategy shifts based on observed behavior patterns.

visit_frequency.description: How often the user returns. Derived from total return count.

preferred_nodes.description: Node IDs the user revisits most often. Derived from visit frequency per node in temporal state.

dwell_time_pattern.description: How long user typically stays per session.

navigation_style.description: Derived from interaction patterns within session.

repetition_score.description: How often user returns to the same nodes. 0 = new user, 10 = highest repetition.

text_tone.description: Replace generic names with personalized descriptions in DEEP mode

presentation_rules.spacing_density: MINIMAL mode reduces padding and margin between elements
presentation_rules.card_emphasis: DEEP mode adds stronger glow and warmth to hero and primary cards
presentation_rules.background_intensity: DEEP mode increases atmosphere opacity and animation duration
presentation_rules.description_style: DEEP mode replaces short emotion text with fuller narrative phrases

runtime_location: apps/miniapp/pages/index/index.js — Section: V5.5.5 World Awareness Layer
